title: Membership Track
description: An enrollment pathway or program category that a user can join independently or simultaneously.

id.description: Unique identifier for the membership track.

name.description: The human-readable name of the track (e.g., “Platinum”).

tiers.description: List of tiers associated with the membership track.

activated_tier.description: The tier that the customer is activated for, identified by the `id` of the Membership Tier object.

rewards.description: List of quantifiable rewards value the user holds. Each object encapsulates one type of reward the track offers.
